MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Reed for (petitioner) Enedina Competente.

Mr. Reed reported what has been done in preparation for discovery and that he is ready to file a motion re discovery. The petition to discover estate assets and compel accounting was continued to December 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeannie Gale for (respondent) Ruth Macchiarini. John Reed for (petitioner) Enedina Competente.

Ms. Gale presented unfiled documents to the court indicating that it was a timeline of events, spoke of the Santa Rosa cabin being uninhabitable and deeded incorrectly, the San Francisco property was transferred during the life of Paula Cohen and explained events regarding the Sonoma property. Ms. Gale stated that there is an expectation of Ms. Macchiarini stepping in as administrator but that she is physically and emotionally unable to come to San Francisco, that there have been no objections to the trust property being put back into the trust or with the inventory or accounting until this proceeding. Ms. Gale also reported on the issue of venue. Mr. Reed stated that the Santa Rosa cabin is inhabitable, that Ms. Macchiarini was aware of the impending foreclosure, and that Ms. Cohen had purchased the cabin with the intent of living there. The court requested both parties to submit proposed orders by October 6, 2014 and the matters will be submitted as of that date if no requests for extensions come in.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING

Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Continued To Sep-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Nielsen appeared by telephone for Ruth Macchiarini (Respondent).

Attorney John Reed was not present. Mr. Nielsen stated that he had not heard from Mr. Reed. The Clerk attempted to reach Mr. Reed by telephone but the call went to voice mail. Mr. Nielsen addressed the issue of venue. The Court advised Mr. Nielsen that it could not proceed without Mr. Reed being present. The Petition to Transfer Action and the Petition to Recover Estate Assets, etc. were continued to September 29, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Nielsen will appear by telephone. Mr. Reed is required to be present. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney John Reed to appear on September 29, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Loan And Status On Ex Parte Application To Amended Letters
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Reed for and with Enedina Competente.

The Court stated that it had received the declaration filed on September 6, 2013. Mr. Reed stated that they were able to put off the foreclosure, that the loan is funded, and that it is being processed. In addition, Mr. Reed addressed the one time death benefit from Cal Pers noting that Judge Dearman had issued an order, that they need amended letters to proceed, and that per Probate Examiner Pam Meyers the petition for amended letters will have a hearing date of October 2, 2013. Mr. Reed further stated that once they have the amended letters and everything is approved that they then can contact Cal Pers for the one time death benefit. The Court inquired about the Inventory. Mr. Reed stated that they could forward what they have to the Referee, that they'd like to include the automobile, that he'd like to talk to the attorney for the Trustee to inquire about the two lots in Sonoma County, and that after that he could forward all the information to the Probate Referee. The Court stated that a partial Inventory could be submitted and then continued the matter to October 2, 2013 for status on the Inventory and status on the filing of the receipt for funds placed in a blocked account. Mr. Reed stated that they probably would not have the receipt by October 2, 2013. The Court stated that it understood but that it wanted to keep the status with regard to the receipt on calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account.

Petition For Permission To Borrow Against Estate Real Property.
Off Calendar Aug-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Reed for and with Enedina Competente (Administrator). Olivia Competente (Daughter).

The Court expressed concerns with this petition, that there is not much information, that appraisal was not done by the Probate Referee and not knowing what the property is worth. Mr. Reed and Ms. Enedina Competente addressed the issues with regard to the amounts that are owed including the reverse mortgage, tax lien, City and County lien, other property that is in the estate and who is applying for the loan that will be secured by the property. Ms. Competente reported that there was real property held by the decedent's mother's trust in Sonoma, that it was sold by the trustee without her knowledge. The trust issue is not before the court. Mr. Reed reported on the other assets of the estate and who are the beneficiaries of the estate, that he has not received a $5,000.00 check from Calsters. The Court continued the status for filing of Blocked Account receipt from August 26, 2013 to September 10, 2013. The Court stated it is important to save the property and granted the Petition for Permission to Borrow against Estate Real Property (subject to review of the order). Status on the loan and status on Ex Parte Application to Amended Letters is set on September 10, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Reed is to file a declaration with details and status of the loan by September 6, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy (Not Reported)

Ex Parte Application Of Enedina Competente, For Order Shortning Time For Notice On Petn. To Borrow Against Estate Real Property & Advance Hearing Date Of Said Petn. Declaration Of John Reed

Petition And Order To Take Possession Of Decedent'S One Time Death Benefit; Attorney Local Rule 4.9 Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Reed for Enedina Comptente.

Mr. Reed asked the Court for an order allowing the Administrator to take possession of the one time death benefit ($5,700.00), to be allowed to amend the letters so that the Administrator could have full authority, to be able to distribute title of the property to the Beneficiary for financing purposes and stated that they have a $10,000.00 bond. The Petition for Order to Take Possession of Decedent's One Time Death Benefit, the Petition for Preliminary Distribution and status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account were taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
